title: Kant And His Commentators.
content:
See how a single rich man gives a living to numbers of beggars!
    'Tis when sovereigns build, carters are kept in employ.
meaning:
Friedrich Schiller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Kant And His Commentators."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
